Bony destruction in congenital syphilis may not lead to pathologic fractures, and may mimic battered child syndrome.

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Pediatric Radiology Case of the Week, Virginia Commonwealth University, May 2005
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **E**（錯誤敘述）。先天性梅毒之骨破壞「可以」導致病理性骨折（may lead to pathologic fractures），而非「不會」。A-D 皆為正確敘述。詳見 [[congenital-syphilis-skeletal]]。

questions.questionText: The three common pediatric primary tracheal & bronchial neoplasms are 1) tracheal hemangioma, 2) papillomatosis, 3) carcinoid tumor.
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Radiologic Clinics of North America Vol 55, Issue 4, July 2017, pp 657-676
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **D（1+2+3）**。三者皆為常見兒童原發氣管/支氣管腫瘤：hemangioma（聲門下）、papillomatosis（喉部為主）、carcinoid tumor（最常見，中央支氣管）。詳見 [[pediatric-airway-neoplasms]]。

questions.questionText: The accessory cardiac bronchus most commonly arises from which of the following site?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Webb WR, Higgins CB. Thoracic Imaging, 2005 ed., P. 1
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **C（Medial wall of bronchus intermedius）**。副心臟支氣管最常見起源自中間支氣管內側壁。詳見 [[accessory-cardiac-bronchus]]。

questions.questionText: What is the most characteristic feature of pulmonary involvement of Kaposi's sarcoma?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Webb WR, Higgins CB. Thoracic Imaging, 2005 ed., P. 124
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **B（Peribronchovascular flame-shaped nodules）**。肺 Kaposi sarcoma 最具特徵性表現為支氣管血管周圍火焰狀（ill-defined）結節，雙側大致對稱分布。詳見 [[pulmonary-kaposi-sarcoma]]。

questions.questionText: Which is the most common type of congenital pulmonary adenomatoid malformation (CPAM)?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Webb WR, Higgins CB. Thoracic Imaging, 2005 ed., P. 6
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **A（Type I）**。CPAM Type I 最常見（~65%），含大囊（>2 cm），預後最佳。詳見 [[cpam-congenital-pulmonary]]。

questions.questionText: Which is the most common type of mediastinal malignant germ cell tumor?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Webb WR, Higgins CB. Thoracic Imaging, 2005 ed., P. 225
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **A（Seminoma）**。Seminoma 為縱膈腔最常見之惡性生殖細胞瘤（約占 40%）。整體而言 mature teratoma 最常見（良性），但 seminoma 為單一組織型態惡性之首。詳見 [[mediastinal-germ-cell-tumors]]。

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT a typical ultrasound finding of cholelithiasis?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Ahuja A. Diagnostic Imaging: Ultrasound. Amirsys; 2007. 2-6~2-9
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **C（Comet-tail artifact）**。Comet-tail artifact 為 adenomyomatosis 的特徵，非膽結石典型表現。膽結石典型三聯徵：echogenic foci + posterior acoustic shadow + gravity-dependent movement。詳見 [[cholelithiasis-ultrasound]]。

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT a typical ultrasound finding of pyogenic liver abscess?

options.text: Vascularity in thick wall portion on color Doppler

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Ahuja A. Diagnostic Imaging: Ultrasound. Amirsys; 2007. p 1-42~1-47
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **D（Posterior acoustic shadow）**。Posterior acoustic shadow 為 solid lesion/calcification 特徵，非化膿性肝膿瘍典型表現。肝膿瘍典型表現為 variable echogenicity、irregular border、thick wall vascularity。詳見 [[pyogenic-liver-abscess-ultrasound]]。

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT a typical ultrasound finding of cirrhosis?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Ahuja A. Diagnostic Imaging: Ultrasound. Amirsys; 2007. p 1-10~1-13
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **C（Atrophy of caudate lobe）**（錯誤敘述）。肝硬化時 caudate lobe 因獨立靜脈回流而代償性「增大（hypertrophy）」，非萎縮。Nodular contour、increased echogenicity、splenomegaly 皆為典型表現。詳見 [[cirrhosis-ultrasound]]。

questions.questionText: 以下關於超音波融合影像(ultrasound fusion imaging)的描述何者為非？

options.text: 通常超音波與磁振造影(MRI)的對位較電腦斷層(CT)準
在調整對位時，通常超音波的影像與電能斷層/磁振造影的影像會連動
左肝常以左門靜脈的臍部作為標定
右肝常以右門靜脈分叉作為標定

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Lee MW. Ultrasonography 2014;33(4):227-239
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **B**（錯誤敘述）。調整對位時移動的是 CT/MRI 影像，超音波為即時影像不動，兩者不會連動。MRI 對位較 CT 準（A正確），左肝以左門靜脈臍部標定（C正確），右肝以右門靜脈分叉標定（D正確）。詳見 [[ultrasound-fusion-imaging]]。

questions.questionText: 超音波對比劑 Sonazoid 在 Kupffer phase（post-vascular phase）時，微氣泡主要被以下何種細胞吞噬？
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Curr Pharm Des. 2012;18(15):2236-52
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **B（Kupffer cell）**。Sonazoid 為第二代超音波對比劑，約注射 10-15 分鐘後進入 Kupffer phase，微氣泡被庫佛氏細胞吞噬滯留，惡性病灶因缺乏 Kupffer cell 而呈現 defect。詳見 [[us-contrast-agents-sonazoid]]。

questions.questionText: 請問在執行超音波導引射頻電燒(US-guided radiofrequency ablation)時，常使用以下何種方法來治療肝臟穹窿(hepatic dome)的病灶？

options.text: 難以治療，為射頻電燒的禁忌症

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；AJR Am J Roentgenol. 2008 Jan;190(1):91-8
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **B（人工復水 artificial ascites）**。注入生理食鹽水至肝臟表面與橫膈間，改善超音波視窗並作為隔熱層保護橫膈膜。詳見 [[us-guided-rfa-liver]]。

questions.questionText: Which of the following types of tissue would have the lowest mean propagation velocity?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **A（Air, 330 m/sec）**。超音波傳播速度：air(330) < fat(1450) < water(1480) < liver(1550) < kidney(1560) < blood(1570) < muscle(1580) < bone(4080 m/s)。詳見 [[ultrasound-physics-basics]]。

questions.questionText: 1 atmosphere (14.7 psi) = 101325 Pa, which is closest to:
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **D（100kPa）**。1 atmosphere = 101,325 Pa = 101.325 kPa ≈ 100 kPa。詳見 [[ultrasound-physics-basics]]。

questions.questionText: Which of the following is not a factor determining spatial resolution?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **D（Acquisition）**。影響 spatial resolution 的因素包括 frequency、transmit intensity、pulse interval，但 acquisition 不是。詳見 [[ultrasound-physics-basics]]。

questions.questionText: Avulsion fracture of the medial epicondyle of the humerus may be seen in ___?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Fundamentals of Pediatric Radiology, p.177
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **A（young baseball pitcher）**。肱骨內上髁撕裂性骨折好發於年輕棒球投手（Little Leaguer's elbow），因反覆投球 valgus stress 造成。詳見 [[medial-epicondyle-avulsion]]。

questions.questionText: Which of the followings is the least common cause of intestinal obstruction in neonates?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Fundamentals of Pediatric Radiology, p. 99
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **D（Acute appendicitis）**。急性闌尾炎極罕見於新生兒。Midgut volvulus、duodenal atresia、annular pancreas 皆為新生兒腸阻塞常見原因。詳見 [[neonatal-intestinal-obstruction]]。

questions.questionText: According to Salter-Harris classification, which type of fracture refers to fracture involving the physis only?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Fundamentals of Pediatric Radiology, p. 174
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **A（Type 1）**。Salter-Harris Type I = 僅通過生長板（physis only）的骨折，X光可能正常。詳見 [[salter-harris]]。

questions.questionText: According to Salter-Harris classification, which type of fracture consists of a crush injury to part or all of a physis?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Fundamentals of Pediatric Radiology, p. 175
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **D（Type 5）**。Salter-Harris Type V = 生長板壓碎傷（crush injury），X光可能初期正常，診斷常為回顧性。詳見 [[salter-harris]]。

questions.questionText: According to grading system for vesicoureteral reflux, ___ is defined by the presence of a very tortuous, dilated ureter.
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Fundamentals of Pediatric Radiology, p. 146
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **D（Grade V reflux）**。Grade V = 嚴重擴張的輸尿管及腎盂腎盞系統 + 輸尿管迂曲（tortuous）+ 乳頭壓痕消失。詳見 [[vesicoureteral-reflux-grading]]。

questions.questionText: About inflammatory lesions of the temporal bone, which one is correct?

options.text: External auditory canal cholesteatoma is a rare lesion with an incidence of approximately 1%-5%.
Keratosis obturans often occurs in younger patients and tends to be bilateral.
Necrotizing or malignant otitis externa most commonly occurs in young female without underlying disease.
External auditory canal cholesteatoma can be easily differentiated from entities such as carcinoma and otitis externa.

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Radiology 2013; 269:17-33
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **B**。Keratosis obturans 好發 <40 歲年輕人，50% 雙側。A 錯（EAC cholesteatoma 發生率約 0.1-0.5%，非 1-5%）。C 錯（necrotizing OE 好發老年糖尿病/免疫低下，非年輕女性）。D 錯（影像非特異性，可被 carcinoma 和 OE 模擬）。詳見 [[temporal-bone-inflammatory]]。

questions.questionText: About temporal bone fracture, which one is incorrect?

options.text: The transverse fracture type is more common.
Classification of temporal bone fractures is according to their orientation relative to the long axis of the petrous pyramid.
A transverse fracture is associated with a higher risk of facial nerve injury.
Conductive hearing loss after temporal bone trauma is usually related to hemotympanum or tympanic membrane rupture, rather than ossicular chain disruption.

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Radiology 2015; 276:655-672
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **A**（錯誤敘述）。**Longitudinal fracture 才是最常見（70-80%）**，非 transverse。B、C、D 皆為正確敘述。詳見 [[temporal-bone-fracture]]。

questions.questionText: About large vestibular aqueduct syndrome, which one is correct?

options.text: Rarely occurs simultaneously with other inner ear abnormalities.
Large vestibular aqueduct is the most common findings on CT for pediatric patient with sensorineural hearing loss.
No genetic cause has been found.
The vestibular aqueduct was considered enlarged when it measured greater than 0.6 mm at the midpoint at tomography greater than 1.5 mm.

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Radiology 2015; 276:655-672
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **B**。LVA 是兒童 SNHL CT 上最常見的發現。A 錯（常合併其他內耳異常）。C 錯（SLC26A4 基因突變約 27%）。D 的敘述其實是 LVA 的判定標準描述，但選項語句不完整（missing "or"），且 B 為最佳正確答案。詳見 [[large-vestibular-aqueduct]]。

questions.questionText: About otosclerosis, which one is correct?

options.text: CT is not useful for identifying causes of post-stapedectomy failure.
Retrofenestral otosclerosis rarely occurs in isolation and is almost always seen in association with fenestral otosclerosis.
Retrofenestral otosclerosis manifests as a characteristic "halo" around the oval window.

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Radiology 2015; 276:655-672
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **C**。Retrofenestral otosclerosis 幾乎不單獨出現，通常伴隨 fenestral 病變。A 錯（frequently bilateral）。B 錯（CT 可用於評估 post-stapedectomy failure）。D 錯（retrofenestral 表現為 cochlea 周圍 halo，非 oval window）。詳見 [[otosclerosis]]。

questions.questionText: Which one is contraindication of intra-arterial thrombectomy?

options.text: The Alberta stroke programme early CT score = 6
The National Institutes of Health Stroke Scale = 6

questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **C（mRS = 6）**。Modified Rankin Scale 6 = 死亡，為絕對禁忌症。ASPECTS 6 仍可考慮治療（美國建議 ≥6），NIHSS 6 在治療範圍內，GCS 6 非特定禁忌。詳見 [[intra-arterial-thrombectomy]]。

questions.questionText: Which one is WRONG about Fahr Disease?

options.text: Bilateral symmetric calcifications in basal ganglia.
The calcification is usually hyperintense on T1WI.
Onset of clinical symptoms is typically 30-60 years.

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Diagnostic Imaging, Brain, Third edition, p.876-879
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **C**（錯誤敘述）。Fahr disease 有文獻報告存在 infantile form，"no infantile form" 為不正確。A（雙側對稱基底核鈣化）、B（T1WI 高訊號）、D（30-60 歲發病）皆為正確敘述。詳見 [[fahr-disease]]。

questions.questionText: Which nerve injury does NOT cause muscle atrophy?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Radiopaedia: cranial nerves
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **B**（前庭耳蝸神經）。CN VIII 為純感覺神經（聽覺＋平衡），無運動纖維，損傷不會造成去神經化肌肉萎縮。CN V（咀嚼肌）、CN VII（面部表情肌）、CN XII（舌肌）損傷皆可致肌肉萎縮。

→ [[cranial-nerve-muscle-atrophy]]

questions.questionText: Which one is WRONG about location of tuber cinereum?

options.text: Between optic chiasm and mammillary body

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Diagnostic and surgical imaging anatomy: brain, head & neck, spine. P.88
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**（錯誤敘述）。Tuber cinereum 位於 mammillary body **前方**（anterior），非後方。它是介於 optic chiasm 與 mammillary body 之間的間腦膜，infundibulum 自此向下延伸至垂體柄。

→ [[hypothalamic-anatomy]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following structures makes up the boundary of the perineum?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Radiographics. 2018 Jul-Aug;38(4):1111-1130
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **C**（薦結節韌帶）。會陰邊界：前方 pubic symphysis、前外側 ischiopubic ramus、**後外側 sacrotuberous ligament**、後方 coccyx/sacrum。A/B/D 皆為會陰區域肌肉，非邊界結構。

→ [[perineum-anatomy-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following imaging findings allows differentiation of a urethral diverticulum from other periurethral cystic lesions?

options.text: Direct continuity with the urethral lumen

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Radiographics. 2018 Jul-Aug;38(4):1111-1130
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**。尿道憩室與尿道管腔直接相通為其獨特鑑別特徵。Gartner duct cyst（陰道近端前外側）、Bartholin gland cyst（恥骨聯合以下後外側）、Skene duct cyst（外尿道口旁）均不與尿道管腔相通。

→ [[urethral-diverticulum]]

questions.questionText: What artery is the major blood supply to the perineum?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Radiographics. 2018 Jul-Aug;38(4):1111-1130
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **B**（內陰部動脈）。Internal pudendal artery 為內髂動脈前分支，是會陰區的主要血液供應。

→ [[perineum-anatomy-imaging]]

questions.questionText: What imaging modality is best for evaluation of urethral injury?

options.text: CT with intravenous contrast material, delayed phase

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Radiographics. 2018 Jul-Aug;38(4):1111-1130
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **C**（透視引導逆行性尿道攝影）。RUG 為評估尿道損傷之 gold standard。CT cystography / fluoroscopic cystography 用於膀胱損傷。

→ [[urethral-injury-imaging]]

questions.questionText: What imaging modality is best for initial evaluation of scrotal injury?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Radiographics. 2018 Jul-Aug;38(4):1111-1130
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **A**（超音波）。US 為陰囊損傷初始評估首選：快速、無輻射、可即時評估睪丸完整性與血流。

→ [[scrotal-trauma-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following statement regarding to the classic radiological signs of ureter stricture is WRONG?

options.text: Balloon on a string sign: Dilation of the renal collecting system and proximal ureter classically seen in UVJ obstruction >> UPJ
Sawtooth appearance of the ureter: Occurs in patients with TB involvement of the ureter characterized by luminal irregularity with areas of narrowing and dilation
Pipe stem ureter: Occurs later in the course of tuberculous involvement of the ureter with the ureter rigid and straight
Corkscrew or beaded ureter: Seen after healing and fibrosis in patients with tuberculous involvement of the ureter

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Abdominal imaging, chap 63 Benign and Malignant Ureteral Strictures
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **A**（錯誤敘述）。Balloon on a string sign 經典見於 **UPJ 阻塞**，非 UVJ。選項敘述「UVJ obstruction >> UPJ」方向反了。

→ [[ureter-stricture-signs]]

questions.questionText: Renal venous thrombosis is sometimes seen in radiological studies. Which of the following statement regarding to the cause of renal venous thrombosis is incorrect?

options.text: Renal vein thrombosis in adults usually is due to a hypercoagulable state, most commonly nephrotic syndrome.
In children, it is usually associated with sepsis and dehydration
Neoplastic invasion of the renal vein is more common in metastatic renal tumors than in primary renal tumors.
Mechanical compression of renal vein from abscess, tumor, lymphadenopathy, and aneurysm will cause renal venous thrombosis.

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Abdominal imaging chap 65 Renal Vascular Diseases
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **C**（錯誤敘述）。腫瘤性腎靜脈侵犯在**原發性腎腫瘤（RCC）**比轉移性腎腫瘤更常見，選項 C 敘述反了。

→ [[renal-venous-thrombosis]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following signs is not a classic finding of renal TB?

options.text: End-stage renal parenchymal disease manifesting as a calcified putty kidney

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Abdominal imaging chap 64 Diffuse Renal Parenchymal Diseases
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **B**（Rice bodies）。Rice bodies 為**關節結核（TB arthritis）**之關節腔內特徵，非泌尿系統結核。腎結核經典表現包括乳頭壞死(A)、漏斗狹窄合併局部腎盞擴張(C)、灰泥腎(D)。

→ [[renal-tuberculosis]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following imaging strategy for acute pyelonephritis (APN) is least appropriate?

options.text: CT is appropriate in adult patient who are diabetic, immunocompromised or complicated.
Reflux study is appropriate in pediatric patient who had suspected functional disorder of urinary system.
CT or MRI is appropriate in pediatric patient who had repeated pyelonephritis without definite findings in reflux study.
CT is important in patient with simple APN to exam the extend of infection.

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Abdominal imaging chap 64 Diffuse Renal Parenchymal Diseases
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**（最不適當）。單純性 APN 不需常規 CT 評估感染範圍。CT 主要適用於複雜性、糖尿病/免疫低下(A)、或兒童反覆發作(C)。

→ [[acute-pyelonephritis-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following statement regarding to the RCC is WRONG?

options.text: Small RCCs (<3 cm) are more likely to be hyperechoic, which can lead to misdiagnosis as angiomyolipoma.
Despite their large size, chromophobe RCCs are homogeneously hyperechoic on ultrasonography
Preoperative CT is more than 90% accurate in staging RCC, and distinguishes T2 from T3a lesions easily by observing perinephric stranding.
A chest radiograph is usually sufficient in the initial staging of RCC if the primary tumor is small (<3 cm)

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Abdominal imaging chap 63 Benign, Malignant, and Cystic Focal Renal Lesions
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **C**（錯誤敘述）。CT 術前分期整體準確度高，但**無法可靠由 perinephric stranding 區分 T2 與 T3a**。腎周脂肪條紋可見於水腫/血管充血等非侵犯因素。

→ [[renal-cell-carcinoma-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT a typical MRI finding of endometrial cancer?

options.text: Intermediate signal intensity on T2WI relative to normal endometrium
Isointensity on T1WI relative to myometrium
Low signal intensity on ADC map

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Hricak H. Diagnostic Imaging: Gynecology. 2007. p 2-140~2-141
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**（非典型表現）。子宮內膜癌在 T1C+(Gd) 增強後**強化程度低於正常子宮內膜**，非高增強。A（T2WI 中等訊號）、B（T1WI 等訊號）、C（ADC 低訊號）皆為典型表現。

→ [[endometrial-cancer-mri]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT correct considering staging of endometrial cancer?

options.text: Intact junctional zone is suggestive of absence of deep myometrial invasion
Disruption of low signal intensity cervical stroma is suggestive of cervical invasion
Disruption of outer low signal line of uterus is suggestive of serosal invasion
Bullous edema of urinary bladder wall is suggestive of bladder mucosal invasion > cystitis

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Hricak H. Diagnostic Imaging: Gynecology. 2007. p 2-150~2-152
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**（不正確敘述）。膀胱壁水泡狀水腫（bullous edema）提示膀胱炎（cystitis），而非膀胱黏膜侵犯。

→ [[endometrial-cancer-mri]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT a typical image finding of ovarian mucinous cystadenoma?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Hricak H. Diagnostic Imaging: Gynecology. 2007. p 7-54~7-59
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **C**。"Spider web" appearance 為**腹膜包裹性囊腫（peritoneal inclusion cyst）**之特徵。黏液性囊腺瘤特徵為體積大(A)、多房(B)、"stained glass" appearance(D)。

→ [[ovarian-mucinous-cystadenoma]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT a typical image finding of ovarian fibrothecoma?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Hricak H. Diagnostic Imaging: Gynecology. 2007. p 7-28~7-31
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **C**。纖維莢膜瘤因富含纖維基質，動態增強呈**延遲弱增強（delayed weak enhancement）**，非早期增強。A/B/D 皆為典型表現。

→ [[ovarian-fibrothecoma]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT a typical image finding of ovarian mature cystic teratoma?

options.text: High signal intensity on T1WI without fat saturation

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Hricak H. Diagnostic Imaging: Gynecology. 2007
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **B**。T2WI shadowing（shading sign）為**子宮內膜異位瘤（endometrioma）**特徵（含鐵血黃素致 T2 訊號降低），非成熟囊性畸胎瘤。

→ [[ovarian-mature-cystic-teratoma]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following statement regarding to the echo appearance of bowel wall is correct?

options.text: Bowel lumen is well-demonstrated under echo, especially when air is present.
Under most circumstances, US could identify five bowel wall layers

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Problem Solving in Abdominal Imaging, First Edition, chap 16, fig 16-5
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **C**。腸壁超音波五層（gut signature）：superficial mucosa(高)/deep mucosa(低)/**submucosa(高,最亮最厚)**/muscularis propria(低)/serosa(高)。A 錯（空氣干擾回音）、B 錯（muscularis mucosae 為低回音）、D 為部分正確但非最佳答案（大多情況可辨 5 層，但考慮腸氣干擾）。

→ [[bowel-wall-layers]]

questions.questionText: Which finding is the clue to rotational abnormalities of the bowel?

options.text: Superior mesenteric vein positioned to the right of the SMA
SMA initially courses to the left rather than right
Duodenum crosses midline between the aorta and SMA
Small bowel located in the right abdomen, large bowel on the left

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Problem Solving in Abdominal Imaging, First Edition, chap 16 BOX 16-1
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**。小腸位於右側腹部、大腸位於左側腹部是腸道旋轉異常最具診斷價值的線索。A/B/C 為正常解剖配置或非特異性發現。

→ [[bowel-rotational-abnormalities]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following state describes typical morphological change of cirrhosis?

options.text: Left lateral segment hypertrophy, caudate lobe hypertrophy and expanded gallbladder fossa.
Left lateral segment hypotrophy, caudate lobe hypertrophy and expanded gallbladder fossa.
Left lateral segment hypotrophy, caudate lobe hypotrophy and expanded gallbladder fossa.
Left lateral segment hypotrophy, caudate lobe hypotrophy and tight gallbladder fossa.

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Problem Solving in Abdominal Imaging, First Edition, chap 12 Fig 12-34
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **A**。肝硬化典型形態變化：left lateral segment **肥大**（hypertrophy）、caudate lobe **肥大**（hypertrophy）、gallbladder fossa **擴張**（expanded）。Right lobe 則萎縮。

→ [[cirrhosis-morphology-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following statement about common collaterals of portal hypertension is incorrect?

options.text: Esophageal and paraesophageal varices are typically supplied by left gastric (coronary) vein.
Gastric varices are typically supplied by left gastric (coronary) vein and short gastric veins.
Paraumbilical varices are typically supplied by mesenteric veins.
Left renal vein shunts are typically supplied by gastric (gastrorenal shunt) and splenic (splenorenal shunt) veins

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Problem Solving in Abdominal Imaging, First Edition, chap 12 table 12-9
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **C**（錯誤敘述）。Paraumbilical varices 由 **paraumbilical veins（Inf. Vein of Sappey）** 供應，非 mesenteric veins。

→ [[portal-hypertension-collaterals]]

questions.questionText: About the incidence of US findings in patient with acute pancreatitis, which of the following order is correct (from highest to lowest)?

options.text: Peripancreatic inflammation > Indistinct ventral margin > Focal mass > Venous thrombosis
Venous thrombosis > Peripancreatic inflammation > Indistinct ventral margin > Focal mass
Peripancreatic inflammation > Venous thrombosis > Indistinct ventral margin > Focal mass
Focal mass > Peripancreatic inflammation > Indistinct ventral margin > Venous thrombosis

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Problem Solving in Abdominal Imaging, First Edition, chap 14 table 14-2
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **A**。急性胰臟炎超音波發現頻率排序：Peripancreatic inflammation（最常見）> Indistinct ventral margin > Focal mass > Venous thrombosis（最少見）。

→ [[acute-pancreatitis-ultrasound]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT the portosystemic collaterals pathways area?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；World Journal of Gastroenterology, March 14, 2017 Volume 23 Issue 10
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **C**（十二指腸）。主要門體側枝通路為：EV/GV（食道/胃）、直腸、臍旁（caput medusae）、後腹膜、肝裸區。十二指腸不在經典側枝通路中。

→ [[portal-hypertension-collaterals]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is the ancillary features favoring benignity in liver tumors?

options.text: Iron in mass, more than liver.

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；RadioGraphics 2017; 37:1994-2017
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **A**。Iron in mass more than liver 為 LI-RADS ancillary feature favoring **benignity**。B（nodule-in-nodule）、C（corona enhancement）、D（non-enhancing capsule）皆為 favoring malignancy/HCC 之特徵。

→ [[li-rads-ancillary-benignity]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following concerning renal lymphoma is False?

options.text: Can present as bilateral nephromegaly without any focal lesions.

questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**（錯誤敘述）。腎臟淋巴瘤為 **hypovascular**，非 hypervascular。Vessels invasion 亦非其典型特徵。A/B/C 皆正確。

→ [[renal-lymphoma-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Which disease can be characterized with air trapping in the appearance of mosaic lung attenuation?
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **C**（小氣道疾病）。Air trapping 合併 mosaic lung attenuation 為小氣道疾病之典型表現。呼氣相可確認 air trapping。

→ [[small-airway-disease-imaging]]

questions.questionText: 根據 revised ATS/ERS/JRS/ALAT diagnostic criteria for idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis，下列 pattern 何者錯誤?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Respir Res. 2013; 14(Suppl 1): S2
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **B**。ATS/ERS/JRS/ALAT IPF 診斷標準的 HRCT pattern 分類為：UIP pattern、Possible UIP pattern、Inconsistent with UIP pattern。**NSIP pattern 不在此分類中** — NSIP 為獨立的 IIP 亞型。

→ [[ipf-uip-pattern-criteria]]

questions.questionText: 下列 pulmonary nodules 的描述何者錯誤?

options.text: Solid nodule 指 size<3 cm 實質化的結節。
Subsolid nodule 專指部分 solid、部分 ground glass component 的結節，不包含 pure ground glass nodule。
Ground glass nodule 指其 density 比一般肺高，但比 soft tissue density 低。
Perifissural nodule 指鄰近 lung fissure 的結節。

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Radiographics. 2014 Oct;34(6):1658-1679; Radiology. 2017 Jul;284(1):228-243
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **B**（錯誤敘述）。Subsolid nodule 涵蓋 part-solid nodule **和** pure ground-glass nodule 兩者，選項 B 稱「不包含 pure GGN」為錯誤。

→ [[pulmonary-nodule-classification]]

questions.questionText: Which choice is false about image findings of mycobacterial infection?

options.text: Primary tuberculosis demonstrates radiologic findings that include lymphadenopathy, consolidation, pleural effusion, and miliary nodules.
Postprimary tuberculosis demonstrates consolidations that are predominant in the apical and upper lung zones, nodules, and cavitation.
Lymphadenopathy in tuberculosis typically demonstrates a low-attenuation center with peripheral rim enhancement on contrast material-enhanced CT images.
Classic (cavitary) nontuberculous mycobacterial infection can have an appearance and clinical manifestations indistinguishable from those of postprimary tuberculosis.
Miliary tuberculosis is spread by endobronchial spreading, as demonstrated by the finding of a miliary nodule centered on a small bronchiole.

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；RadioGraphics 2017; 37(1):52-72
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **E**（錯誤敘述）。Miliary TB 經由**血行散播（hematogenous dissemination）**，非支氣管內散播（endobronchial）。Miliary nodules 為 random distribution，非 centrilobular。Endobronchial spread 才會產生 tree-in-bud pattern。

→ [[mycobacterial-infection-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Which choice is false about mediastinal and pleural MR imaging?

options.text: Early arterial phase images are critical for detection of enhancement of mediastinal soft-tissue lesions.
Lesions that demonstrate foci of enhancement, whether nodular, circumferential, septate, diffuse, or heterogeneous, cannot be considered benign mediastinal cysts by their MR appearance.
The two key MR imaging features that can be used to direct biopsy are areas of enhancement and diffusion restriction.
Enhancement within a thrombus should be considered diagnostic of tumor and is best identified in the portal venous phase.
Signal intensity index was recently shown to be of benefit in thoracic MR imaging for evaluating thymic hyperplasia.

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；RadioGraphics 2017; 37(1):52-72
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **A**（錯誤敘述）。縱膈腔軟組織病灶的增強偵測不依賴早期動脈相 — 延遲相更重要。B/C/D/E 皆為正確敘述。SII = [(tSIin - tSIop) / tSIin] × 100%。

→ [[mediastinal-pleural-mri]]

questions.questionText: Regarding the WHO 2016 classification of medulloblastoma molecular subtypes, which one is WRONG?

options.text: WNT-activated: centered in cerebellar peduncle/CPA, best prognosis
Group 3: midline, good prognosis with well-defined margins
Group 3: poor prognosis with ill-defined margins and extensive enhancement

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；RadioGraphics 2018; 38:37-55
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**（錯誤敘述）。Group 3 medulloblastoma 預後**最差**，呈邊界不清 (ill-defined) 且顯著增強，並非 good prognosis with well-defined margins。

→ [[medulloblastoma-subtypes]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following statements about pediatric hepatic neoplasms is INCORRECT?

options.text: Hepatic neoplasms are the most common intraabdominal tumor in children
Hepatoblastoma is the most common malignant hepatic tumor in children < 5 years
HCC is more common in older children with underlying liver disease

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Caffey's Pediatric Diagnostic Imaging, e3, Ch91 P.838-850
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **A**（錯誤敘述）。兒童最常見腹腔內腫瘤為**神經母細胞瘤 (neuroblastoma)**，非肝臟腫瘤。

→ [[hepatic-neoplasm-pediatric]]

questions.questionText: Regarding esophageal atresia, which of the following is correct?

options.text: Associated with VACTERL and CHARGE associations
Polyhydramnios with small or absent stomach bubble on prenatal US
Presence of bowel gas indicates fistula status

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Caffey's Pediatric Diagnostic Imaging, e2, Ch96 P.901-910
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**（以上皆是）。EA 與 VACTERL/CHARGE 相關(A)、產前 polyhydramnios + 胃泡縮小/消失(B)、腹部有腸氣代表有 distal TEF(C) 皆正確。

→ [[esophageal-atresia]]

questions.questionText: Regarding vesicoureteral reflux (VUR), which statement is INCORRECT?

options.text: VCUG is the standard imaging for diagnosis and grading
VUR grading ranges from I to V
It is NOT necessary to evaluate bowel and bladder dysfunction

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Caffey's Pediatric Diagnostic Imaging, e3, Ch119 P.1148-1156
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **C**（錯誤敘述）。評估 BBD 是 VUR 管理中**必要**的一環，BBD 存在會降低 VUR 自然緩解率。

→ [[vur-pediatric]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following best describes Mirizzi syndrome?

options.text: CBD stone causing pancreatic duct obstruction
Gallstone impaction in cystic duct causing CBD compression
Gallstone impaction in GB neck compressing adjacent CHD with intrahepatic bile duct dilation

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **C**。Mirizzi syndrome 為膽囊頸部結石嵌塞，外在壓迫鄰近總肝管 (CHD)，導致肝內膽管擴張。

→ [[mirizzi-syndrome]]

questions.questionText: What is the most significant complication of wandering spleen?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **B**（脾扭轉致缺血）。游離脾最嚴重併發症為脾蒂扭轉導致脾臟缺血壞死，需緊急處理。

→ [[wandering-spleen]]

questions.questionText: What is the most common form of intracranial tuberculosis?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**（結核性腦膜炎）。顱內結核最常見形式為 tuberculous meningitis，好發於顱底蛛網膜下腔 (basal cisterns)，可合併 dystrophic calcification。

→ [[mycobacterial-infection-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Regarding digital breast tomosynthesis (DBT) and architectural distortion (AD), which statement is WRONG?

options.text: AD is less commonly detected on DBT than on 2D mammography
DBT can reduce false positive recall rates
DBT provides better tissue overlap resolution
DBT is useful for characterizing focal asymmetries

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；RadioGraphics 2015; 35:975-990
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **A**（錯誤敘述）。Architectural distortion 在 DBT 上偵測率**更高**（非更低），因 DBT 去除組織重疊，使 AD 更容易辨識。

→ [[breast-tomosynthesis]]

questions.questionText: What is the most common congenital abnormality of the GI tract?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**（梅克爾憩室）。Meckel diverticulum 為最常見 GI 先天異常，盛行率約 2%。遵循 rule of 2s：2% 人口、距 ileocecal valve 2 feet、2 inches 長。

→ [[meckel-diverticulum]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT a cause of small bowel obstruction (SBO)?

options.text: All of the above can cause SBO

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；RadioGraphics 2009; 29:423-439
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **E**（以上皆可造成 SBO）。Adhesion、hernia、Crohn disease、intussusception 皆為 SBO 之已知原因。

→ [[sbo-causes-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Renal angiomyolipoma (AML) is most commonly associated with which condition?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **B**（結節性硬化症）。腎 AML 與 TSC 高度相關，TSC 患者中 AML 常為多發、雙側。

→ [[renal-aml-tuberous-sclerosis]]

questions.questionText: A patient presents with thumb pain due to nerve compression. Which nerve root is most likely involved?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Diagnostic Neuroradiology, Osborn P.121
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **B（C6）**。拇指皮節對應 C6 神經根。C5 = 上臂外側（deltoid area），C7 = 中指，C8 = 小指。

→ [[cervical-nerve-root-dermatome]]

questions.questionText: Regarding basilar artery occlusion, which of the following is correct?

options.text: Proximal segment occlusion is most common

questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**（以上皆是）。BAO 以近端阻塞最常見(A)、可致雙側丘腦梗塞(B)、與 ICAS 高度相關(C)。

→ [[basilar-artery-occlusion]]

questions.questionText: 關於結核病傳播途徑，下列何者為非？

options.text: Hematogenous spread plays important role in early stages of initial/primary infection
Lymphatic dissemination incidence in postprimary TB is low due to enhanced acquired immunity
Increasing incidence of primary TB in adults and postprimary TB in immunocompromised
Miliary CT findings represent hematogenous dissemination with random pattern micronodules

questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **1**（錯誤敘述）。初期/原發感染早期重要的傳播途徑是**淋巴性傳播 (lymphatic spread)**，非血行性傳播。血行性傳播（粟粒性）較晚發生。

→ [[mycobacterial-infection-imaging]]

questions.questionText: 根據 2015 年 ATA guideline，下列何者為 high suspicious sonographic patterns for malignancy?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；2015 ATA Management Guidelines
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D（1,3,4）**。High suspicious patterns: (1) hypoechoic + irregular margin、(3) hypoechoic + taller-than-wide、(4) interrupted rim calcification with soft tissue extrusion。(2) isoechoic + regular margin 非 high suspicion、(5) spongiform 為 very low suspicion。

→ [[ata-thyroid-guideline]]

questions.questionText: May-Thurner syndrome means:

options.text: Left renal vein between SMA and aorta
Third portion of duodenum compressed between SMA and aorta
Compression of celiac artery by median arcuate ligament
Left common iliac vein compressed between right common iliac artery and fifth lumbar vertebra

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**。May-Thurner syndrome：左髂總靜脈被夾於右髂總動脈與第五腰椎之間。A = Nutcracker syndrome、B = SMA syndrome、C = Median arcuate ligament syndrome。跨年重複 2018-150。

→ [[may-thurner]]

questions.questionText: 有關 Maffucci's syndrome，下列何者正確？

options.text: Multiple enchondroma 與 soft tissue sarcoma
常合併有 soft tissue hemangioma

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **C**。Maffucci syndrome = 多發性內生軟骨瘤 (multiple enchondromas) + **軟組織血管瘤 (soft tissue hemangiomas)**，非 sarcoma。

→ [[enchondromatosis]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is true regarding complete D-transposition of the great arteries (D-TGA)?

options.text: There is atrioventricular concordance and ventriculoarterial discordance
Aorta is anterior and slightly leftward to PA
Newborns are asymptomatic if VSD intact

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **A**。D-TGA = AV concordance (RA→RV, LA→LV) + VA discordance (RV→Aorta, LV→PA)。B 錯（corrected TGA = L-TGA）、C 錯（偏右非偏左）、D 錯（intact septum 嚴重發紺）。

→ [[d-tga]]

questions.questionText: About MR Elastography, which one is wrong?

options.text: Edge effects, partial volume, CSF contamination need to be minimized
In NPH, MRE showed increased brain stiffness in cerebrum, especially occipital lobe

questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **B**（錯誤敘述）。MR Elastography 為**非侵入性 (non-invasive)** MRI 技術，利用外部振動源產生 shear wave 量測組織硬度。

→ [[mr-elastography-brain]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is classically seen with sigmoid volvulus?

options.text: Dilated sigmoid directed toward right hemidiaphragm
Transverse colon cranial to sigmoid colon

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **B**。Sigmoid volvulus 經典表現：擴張的乙狀結腸朝右側橫膈方向延伸（coffee bean sign / inverted U sign）。

→ [[colon-volvulus]]

questions.questionText: 根據 2015 年 ATA guideline，下列何種 thyroid nodules 建議接受 fine needle aspiration?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；2015 ATA Management Guidelines
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **C（2,3,4）**。FNA 建議閾值：(2) intermediate ≥ 1 cm、(3) low ≥ 1.5 cm、(4) very low ≥ 2 cm。(1) high suspicious 閾值為 ≥ 1 cm（非 0.5 cm）、(5) benign 不需 FNA。

→ [[ata-thyroid-guideline]]

questions.questionText: The risk of bowel incarceration in hernias, from high to low:

options.text: Inguinal hernia (direct) > Inguinal hernia (indirect) > Femoral hernia
Inguinal hernia (indirect) > Inguinal hernia (direct) > Femoral hernia
Femoral hernia > Inguinal hernia (direct) > Inguinal hernia (indirect)
Femoral hernia > Inguinal hernia (indirect) > Inguinal hernia (direct)

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；RadioGraphics 2011; 31:E1-E12
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**。嵌頓風險由高到低：Femoral > Indirect inguinal > Direct inguinal。股疝股環狹窄堅硬，嵌頓風險最高。

→ [[hernia-incarceration-risk]]

questions.questionText: An 8-month-old male infant with contracted skull base, small foramen magnum, rhizomelic shortening, trident hands, brachydactyly, progressive interpedicular narrowing at lumbar spine, short pedicles, and flat-roofed acetabula. Most likely diagnosis?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**（軟骨發育不全）。Achondroplasia 典型特徵：contracted skull base、small foramen magnum、rhizomelic shortening、trident hand、brachydactyly、腰椎 interpedicular distance 漸縮、short pedicles、flat-roofed acetabula。其他選項（achondrogenesis、thanatophoric dysplasia）多為致死性。

→ [[achondroplasia]]

questions.questionText: 目前 IA mechanical thrombectomy 的最高 Strength of Evidence?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；AHA guideline 2015
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **A（1a）**。根據 AHA 2015 guideline，mechanical thrombectomy 之 Class I; Level of Evidence A（最高等級）recommendation。

→ [[intra-arterial-thrombectomy]]

questions.questionText: A large infiltrative hepatic mass demonstrating early enhancement and portal vein invasion is most consistent with which of the following?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**（肝細胞癌）。HCC 典型特徵為動脈期早期增強 (arterial enhancement) 合併門脈侵犯 (portal vein invasion/tumor thrombus)。Cholangiocarcinoma 通常延遲增強；lymphoma 通常低血管性；biliary cystadenoma 為囊性病灶。

→ [[infiltrative-hcc]]

questions.questionText: AJCC 8th edition 對於頭頸癌之分期有哪些重大改變？
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；AJCC Cancer Staging Manual, 8th Edition
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **B（2,3）**。重大改變：(2) p16-positive OPC 有獨立 TNM 分期、(3) extranodal extension 影響 N 分期。(1) 口腔癌 tumor thickness 取代 depth of invasion 非此題範圍表述方式、(4) 口咽癌須量測 DOI 之敘述形式與正確答案不符。

→ [[ajcc-head-neck-8th]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is the most common anatomical variant of the pancreas?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；RadioGraphics 2006; 26:715-731
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **A**（Pancreas divisum）。Pancreas divisum 為最常見胰臟解剖變異，盛行率 5-10%。由胚胎期腹側與背側胰管未融合所致。

→ [[pancreas-divisum]]

questions.questionText: 下列有關 Cone beam CT (CBCT) 與 MDCT 比較，何者為非？
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；AJNR Am J Neuroradiol 37:481-86
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **2**（錯誤敘述）。CBCT 的 temporal resolution **低於** MDCT（旋轉速度較慢）。其餘皆正確：spatial resolution 較高(1)、重建時間較長(3)、scatter artifact 較多(4)。

→ [[cbct-vs-mdct]]

questions.questionText: 下列何者有誤？關於 accessory breast tissue

options.text: Accessory breast tissue is residual breast tissue from normal embryologic development
Accessory breast tissue can be found in up to 36% of the population
The highest incidence occurs in Japanese population, lowest in white individuals
Supernumerary breasts are found along the milk line from anterior axillary folds to inguinal region and medial thigh
Aberrant breast tissue is an island of breast tissue usually located in proximity to the normal breast

questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **2**（錯誤敘述）。副乳組織盛行率約 **2-6%**，非 36%。

→ [[accessory-breast-tissue]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is a true diverticulum of the small bowel?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Gore RM, Levine MS. Textbook of Gastrointestinal Radiology. 4th ed.
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **A**（Meckel diverticulum）。True diverticulum 包含腸壁所有層次（mucosa + submucosa + muscularis propria）。小腸中唯一常見的 true diverticulum 是 **Meckel diverticulum**（卵黃管殘留）。十二指腸、空腸、迴腸憩室皆為 false (pseudo) diverticulum，僅含黏膜與黏膜下層。

→ [[true-diverticulum]]、[[meckel-diverticulum]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following descriptions about Joubert syndrome is WRONG?

options.text: Molar tooth sign on axial MRI
Elongated and thickened superior cerebellar peduncles
Bat wing appearance of the fourth ventricle

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Osborn's Brain 2e P1192-1193
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **B**（錯誤敘述）。Joubert syndrome 的小腦蚓部（vermis）為**小且發育不全（small and dysmorphic/hypoplastic）**，非「enlarged」。Molar tooth sign (A)、elongated/thickened SCPs (C)、bat wing 4th ventricle (D) 皆為正確特徵。

→ [[joubert-syndrome]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following descriptions about posterior reversible encephalopathy syndrome (PRES) is WRONG?

options.text: Commonly associated with hypertension, eclampsia, and immunosuppressive therapy
Restricted diffusion (DWI positive) is the typical finding

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Osborn's Brain 2e P1019-1020
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**（錯誤敘述）。PRES 絕大多數病例為**血管源性水腫（vasogenic edema）**，DWI 表現為**無擴散受限（DWI 陰性、ADC 升高或正常）**。若出現 restricted diffusion（DWI 陽性、ADC 降低）則提示已進展至細胞毒性水腫，預後較差，但**非典型表現**。

→ [[pres]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following descriptions about mucopolysaccharidoses (MPS) imaging findings is WRONG?

options.text: White matter changes with enlarged perivascular spaces

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Osborn's Brain 2e P994
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **A**（錯誤敘述）。MPS 患者表現為 **macrocephaly（大頭症）**，因 GAG 堆積致腦室擴大與腦容積增加，**非 microcephaly（小頭症）**。B（白質病變、PVS 擴大）、C（硬腦膜增厚）、D（脊椎椎體前喙突）皆為正確影像特徵。

→ [[mucopolysaccharidosis-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following descriptions about cerebral proliferative angiopathy (CPA) is WRONG?

options.text: Large, diffuse vascular lesion involving multiple vascular territories
Lower hemorrhage risk compared to typical AVM
No normal brain tissue is present between the abnormal vessels

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Osborn's Brain 2e P163-164
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**（錯誤敘述）。CPA 與典型 AVM 的關鍵差異在於 CPA **含有正常腦實質夾雜於異常血管之間（interposed normal brain parenchyma）**，典型 AVM 的 compact nidus 則無。A（大範圍瀰漫性）、B（transdural supply 常見）、C（出血風險較低）皆為正確描述。

→ [[cerebral-proliferative-angiopathy]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following descriptions about urethral injury is WRONG?

options.text: Posterior urethral injury is more common than anterior urethral injury
Retrograde urethrography is the gold standard for diagnosis
Urethral injury is more common in females than males
Pelvic fracture is the most common cause of posterior urethral injury

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；RadioGraphics 2018;38:1111-1130
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **C**（錯誤敘述）。尿道損傷在**男性**遠比女性常見，因男性尿道較長且固定於恥骨聯合，更易受骨盆骨折等外傷影響。女性尿道短且可動性大，損傷罕見。

→ [[urethral-injury-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following descriptions about Fournier gangrene is WRONG?

options.text: Necrotizing fasciitis of the perineum and genital region
CT is the imaging modality of choice
Subcutaneous emphysema is a common finding
Absence of subcutaneous air excludes the diagnosis of Fournier gangrene

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；RadioGraphics 2018;38:1111-1130
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**（錯誤敘述）。皮下氣腫雖為 Fournier gangrene 常見影像表現（約 60-90%），但**缺乏皮下氣體並不能排除診斷**。早期或產氣菌比例低的病例可無明顯氣體。A（壞死性筋膜炎）、B（CT 為首選）、C（皮下氣腫常見）皆為正確描述。

→ [[fournier-gangrene]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following tumors can contain microscopic fat?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；RadioGraphics 2016;36:718
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**（以上皆是）。Adrenal adenoma（約 70% 含豐富 intracellular lipid）、adrenocortical carcinoma、pheochromocytoma 皆可含 microscopic fat（intracellular lipid），在 chemical shift MRI 表現 opposed-phase signal drop。

→ [[microscopic-fat-tumors]]

questions.questionText: What is the most common histologic subtype of testicular cancer?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；RadioGraphics 2018;38:806-830
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **A**（Seminoma）。Seminoma 佔所有睪丸 GCT 約 50-55%，為最常見的單一組織學亞型。好發年齡 30-40 歲。影像上通常為均勻低回音實質腫塊，增強程度低於正常睪丸。

→ [[testicular-seminoma]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following descriptions about testicular torsion is WRONG?

options.text: Bell clapper deformity is a predisposing factor
Further ischemia causes hyperechogenicity of the testis, indicating nonviability
Whirlpool sign of the spermatic cord on ultrasound

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；RadioGraphics 2018;38:806-830
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **C**（錯誤敘述）。進一步缺血導致睪丸呈現 **hypoechogenicity（低回音）**而非 hyperechogenicity，表示睪丸組織壞死不可逆。A（青少年好發）、B（bell clapper deformity 為易發因素）、D（精索 whirlpool sign）皆為正確描述。

→ [[testicular-torsion]]

questions.questionText: What is the most common cause of acute lower gastrointestinal bleeding?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；RadioGraphics 2018;38:1089-1107
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **A**（Diverticulosis）。憩室症佔急性下消化道出血約 30-40%，為最常見原因。Angiodysplasia 為第二常見（約 5-10%），好發於右結腸。大腸癌 (C) 與缺血性結腸炎 (D) 亦可引起但頻率較低。

→ [[lower-gi-bleeding-imaging]]

questions.questionText: 下列何者為最常見的 extra-hepatic collateral artery?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；RadioGraphics 2017;37:964
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **A**（右下橫膈動脈）。Right inferior phrenic artery 為 HCC TACE 時最常見的 extrahepatic collateral artery，尤其供應 bare area 或 dome 位置的 HCC。

→ [[hcc-tace-collateral]]

questions.questionText: 有關 bronchiolitis，以下何者正確?

options.text: Bronchiolitis refers to inflammation and/or fibrosis involving airways, typically bronchioles and/or alveolar ducts.
CT images, almost always demonstrate abnormal findings that include centrilobular micronodules, bronchial wall thickening, bronchiolar dilatation and mosaic attenuation.
Infectious bronchiolitis is by far the most common type of bronchiolitis.

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；RadioGraphics 2017;37:778
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**（以上皆正確）。Bronchiolitis 累及細支氣管(A)；CT 幾乎必有異常(B)；infectious bronchiolitis 為最常見類型(C)。

→ [[bronchiolitis-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Aortic nipple 指的是下列何者在 PA view chest X ray 上的影子?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Radiopaedia: Aortic nipple
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **A**（left superior intercostal vein）。Aortic nipple 為 PA CXR 上主動脈弓外側的小突起，代表左上肋間靜脈匯入左頭臂靜脈前的投影。

→ [[aortic-nipple]]

questions.questionText: 有關 pulmonary tuberculosis，以下何者錯誤?

options.text: Mediastinal and hilar lymphadenopathy is the most common radiologic manifestation of primary tuberculosis.
The cavitation pattern in both primary and post-primary tuberculosis demonstrate an upper lung zone predominance.
Pleural effusion is less common in children.

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；RadioGraphics 2017;37:633
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **B**（錯誤敘述）。Cavitation 的上肺分佈為 **post-primary（reactivation）TB** 特徵，並非 primary TB（primary TB 空洞少見且不具上肺偏好）。A（LAD為primary TB最常見表現）正確；C（兒童較少肋膜積液）正確。

→ [[pulmonary-tb-imaging]]

questions.questionText: 下列何者為 most common primary osseous malignancy of the chest wall?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；RadioGraphics 2016;36:1287
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**（Chondrosarcoma）。軟骨肉瘤為胸壁最常見原發性骨惡性腫瘤，好發於肋軟骨交界處。

→ [[chest-wall-malignancy]]

questions.questionText: 下列何者可能在乳房攝影中產生 high density 的假影?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Clinical Breast Imaging: The Essentials P166
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **E**（以上皆是）。Deodorant（含鋁）、tattoos、彈片、gold deposition 皆可在乳房攝影產生 high density 假影。

→ [[mammography-artifact]]

questions.questionText: 以下的鈣化形式何種有最高的惡性可能性?

options.text: Fine linear or fine linear branching

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；RadioGraphics 2016;36:624
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**（fine linear or fine linear branching）。在 BI-RADS 第五版中，fine linear/branching calcifications 惡性可能性最高（PPV 約70%），為 BI-RADS 4C 或 5。Pleomorphic (C) 次之，amorphous (B) 再次之，coarse heterogeneous (A) 最低。

→ [[breast-calcifications]]

questions.questionText: 有關 background parenchymal enhancement (BPE)，在月經週期的什麼時候較低?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；RadioGraphics 2018;38:983-996
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **B**（Day 7-20）。BPE 在月經第二週（增殖期）最低，為乳房 MRI 最佳檢查時機。月經期(A)和黃體期(C)BPE 較高。

→ [[breast-bpe]]

questions.questionText: 有關 vascular calcification，以下何者錯誤?

options.text: Dense, linear, parallel, or "tram track-like" calcification
Most common in postmenopausal women; When seen in younger premenopausal women, it is often in patients with diabetes or in those with underlying renal disease.
In some women, this is a reversible process.
The calcification may not simulating those occurring in DCIS, even when only a portion of the arterial wall is affected, or when small vessels are involved.

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Clinical Breast Imaging: The Essentials P150
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**（錯誤敘述）。乳房血管鈣化在僅部分動脈壁鈣化或累及小血管時，**可能模擬 DCIS 鈣化**。選項 D 說「不會模擬」是錯誤的。A（tram track 型態）、B（停經後好發）、C（部分可逆）皆正確。

→ [[vascular-calcification-breast]]

questions.questionText: The in-phase and opposed-phase imaging of MRI can be used to characterize tissue composition. The following components show magnetic susceptibility on in-phase imaging, EXCEPT?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **E**（Gross fat）。In-phase imaging 凸顯 magnetic susceptibility artifact：iron deposition(A)、hemorrhage(B)、metal(C)、melanin(D) 皆會。Gross fat（巨觀脂肪）不產生 in-phase susceptibility，而是在 opposed-phase 產生 India ink artifact（水脂界面化學位移）。

→ [[chemical-shift-mri]]

questions.questionText: The Spetzler-Martin arteriovenous malformation (AVM) grading system according to the following three features, which of following was WRONG?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Spetzler RF, Martin NA. JNAG 1986;65:476-483
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **C**（venous ectasia）。Spetzler-Martin AVM 分級依據三項：nidus 大小(A)、鄰近腦 eloquence(B)、靜脈引流型態 superficial vs deep(D)。**Venous ectasia 非 SM 評分項目**。

→ [[spetzler-martin-avm]]

questions.questionText: Which is not the risk factor of recurrence in pituitary macroadenoma?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **E**（Apoplexy）。垂體大腺瘤復發風險因子包括 cavernous sinus invasion(A)、low ADC value(B)、tumor size(C)、subtotal resection(D)。**Apoplexy（垂體卒中）非復發的獨立風險因子**。

→ [[pituitary-macroadenoma]]

questions.questionText: About acute flaccid paralysis in children, which statement is correct?

options.text: MR imaging in enterovirus 71 affected patients typically reveals a rhombencephalitis affecting the dorsal pons and medulla, and a radiculomyelitis with a predilection for the anterior horn cells of the spinal cord and ventral nerve roots.

Patients presenting with acute flaccid paralysis and/or cranial nerve dysfunction during the enterovirus D68 outbreak demonstrate unique imaging findings characterized by brain stem and spinal cord gray matter/anterior horn cells lesions.
Brain stem lesions of enterovirus D68 outbreak most commonly involve the pontine tegmentum.

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**（以上皆正確）。EV71 致 rhombencephalitis（dorsal pons/medulla）+ anterior horn cell radiculomyelitis(A)；EV D68 致 brain stem + spinal cord gray matter lesions(B)；EV D68 腦幹病灶最常累及 pontine tegmentum(C)。

→ [[ev71-cns-complications]]

questions.questionText: For P16+ oropharyngeal cancer, which status is N2 stage?

options.text: Unilateral cervical LN(S) ≤ 3cm in greatest dimension, above of caudal border of cricoid cartilage
Bilateral cervical LN(S) ≤ 6cm in greatest dimension, above the caudal border of cricoid cartilage
Unilateral or bilateral retropharyngeal LN ≤ 3cm in greatest dimension (above the caudal border of cricoid cartilage)
Extension below the caudal border of cricoid cartilage

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；AJCC 8th edition Head and Neck staging
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **B**。P16+ OPC 的 N 分期（AJCC 8th）：N1 = 單側淋巴結 ≤6cm 於環狀軟骨下緣以上；**N2 = 雙側淋巴結 ≤6cm 於環狀軟骨下緣以上**；N3 = >6cm 或延伸至環狀軟骨下緣以下。A 為 N1，D 為 N3。

→ [[ajcc-head-neck-8th]]

questions.questionText: In which one of the following answers can pulmonary ossification be seen?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **F**（以上皆可）。Pulmonary ossification 為肺內成熟骨組織形成，可為 idiopathic 或 secondary，見於 IPF(A)、aspiration(B)、NSIP(C)、pulmonary amyloidosis(D)。

→ [[pulmonary-ossification]]

questions.questionText: The statement of melioidosis, which one is WRONG?

options.text: The "honeycomb" appearance has been described to be characteristic for large melioidosis liver abscesses.
Melioidosis is endemic to northern Australia and the Southeast Asia.
Melioidosis is a serious infection by parasite which is found in wet soils.
The lungs are the most commonly affected organ in melioidosis.

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **C**（錯誤敘述）。Melioidosis 由**細菌 Burkholderia pseudomallei** 引起，**非 parasite（寄生蟲）**。A（honeycomb肝膿瘍）、B（東南亞/澳洲北部）、D（肺為最常受影響器官）皆正確。

→ [[melioidosis]]

questions.questionText: Which is wrong about image evaluation for biliary atresia?

options.text: Biliary atresia can be ruled out if the entire extrahepatic bile duct is seen.
The differential diagnosis of prolonged infant hyperbilirubinemia includes biliary atresia and neonatal hepatitis.
The following image modality can help in diagnosing biliary atresia: sonography, scintigraphy, and MRI.
The diagnosis of biliary atresia can be confirmed if we cannot see extrahepatic bile duct in MRCP study.

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**（錯誤敘述）。膽道閉鎖的確診需 **intraoperative cholangiogram**，MRCP 看不到肝外膽管並不能確診（可能為技術限制或新生兒膽管太小）。A（見到完整膽管可排除）、B（鑑別含BA與新生兒肝炎）、C（US/scintigraphy/MRI有助診斷）皆正確。

→ [[biliary-atresia]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following about fibrous dysplasia (FD) is wrong?

options.text: Only 15-20% are polyostotic, mainly at pelvis, femur, tibia
Uncommonly based in cortex; tibia is most common site for cortically based fibrous dysplasia
Commonly involves the metaphysis and occasionally the epiphysis
Most lesions are mildly sclerotic, causing varying degrees of expansion

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **C**。FD 常見於 diaphysis 或 metaphysis，epiphysis 侵犯極罕見。詳見 [[fibrous-dysplasia]]。

questions.questionText: A 75-year-old male with PSA level 8 microgram/L; prostate cancer of Gleason score 3+3; mpMRI revealing no clinically significant tumor in prostate and no metastatic disease. Which of the following strategy of treatment should be suggested?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **A**。Gleason 3+3、PSA<10、mpMRI 無 significant tumor 屬低風險攝護腺癌，標準處置為 active surveillance。詳見 [[prostate-active-surveillance]]。

questions.questionText: Which of the followings is NOT a factor predicting better outcome about prostatic artery embolization (PAE) of benign prostatic hyperplasia?

options.text: Higher CRP levels 24 hours after PAE
Higher PSA levels 24 hours after PAE
Larger prostates with larger central glands and adenomas

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **C**。Unilateral embolization 效果不如 bilateral，非良好預後因子。詳見 [[prostatic-artery-embolization]]。

questions.questionText: Which is not common drainage site of coronary arteriovenous fistulas (CAVFs)?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **C**。CAVF 最常見 drainage site：right ventricle (41%)、right atrium (26%)、pulmonary artery (17%)。Left ventricle 不常見。詳見 [[coronary-av-fistula]]。

questions.questionText: 依據 Cho-Do classification system，可以將 peripheral AVM 的 nidus 分為 type I, II, IIIa & IIIb。其中 type II 的最佳 embolization 治療方式為: (1) Transarterial approach (2) Transvenous approach (3) direct puncture
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **B**。Type II AVM（多條 arterioles + single outflow vein）最佳治療為 transvenous approach 或 direct puncture。詳見 [[peripheral-avm-classification]]。

questions.questionText: Which of the followings noninvasive techniques can eliminate standing arterial waves on angiography?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **D**。Vasodilator 使血管舒張可消除 standing arterial waves，其餘選項無效。詳見 [[angiography-standing-wave]]。

questions.questionText: Which of the following regarding the calcifications of male breast cancer is true?

options.text: Tends to be more in number than female cancer
More likely linear and less often punctate
Calcifications with a relatively benign appearance in women should be considered suspicious in men

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **D**。男性乳癌鈣化較女性少見、較粗糙，且良性鈣化在男性中罕見（除血管鈣化/脂肪壞死外）。因此在女性看起來良性的鈣化在男性應視為可疑。詳見 [[male-breast-cancer]]。

questions.questionText: Regarding the following artifacts of digital breast tomosynthesis (DBT), which one of them is rarely appreciated because of the masking effect of out-of-plane blurring?

options.text: Loss of Skin and Superficial Tissue Resolution

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **D**。Motion artifact 在 DBT 因 out-of-plane blurring 的遮蔽效應而不易被察覺。詳見 [[dbt-artifact]]。

questions.questionText: Which one is not the neurovascular contents of superior orbital fissure?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **B**。Vidian nerve 走 vidian canal（pterygopalatine fossa 後方），不經過 superior orbital fissure。SOF 通過 CN III、IV、V1、VI 及 superior ophthalmic vein。詳見 [[superior-orbital-fissure]]。

questions.questionText: About pediatric low-grade glioma Genetics, which one is correct?

options.text: smallest number of genetic alterations, with a median of one mutation per tumor
result in activation of the MAPK (mitogen-activated protein kinase) pathway
most common aberration in this pathway being that of its BRAF component

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **D**。兒童 LGG 基因突變數最少（median 1/tumor）、活化 MAPK pathway、最常見為 BRAF 成分突變。詳見 [[pediatric-lgg-genetics]]。

questions.questionText: As compared with primary CNS lymphoma, which is not the MRI characteristics in GBM?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **A**。PCNSL 的 ADC value 比 GBM 更低（cellularity 更高）。Lower ADC 是 PCNSL 特徵而非 GBM。詳見 [[gbm-vs-pcnsl]]。

questions.questionText: Which one is not included in the differential list of diffuse/multiple microbleeds?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **E**。A-D 全部都在 diffuse/multiple microbleeds 的鑑別診斷中。詳見 [[cerebral-microbleeds]]。

questions.questionText: According to the 2017 Fleischner Society guideline for managing incidental pulmonary nodules, what slice thickness is suggested for accurate measurement and characterization?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；MacMahon H et al. Fleischner Society 2017 guidelines. Radiology. 2017;284(1):228-243
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **A**。Fleischner 2017 建議使用 ≤1.5 mm 薄切，以 sharp algorithm 重建，避免 partial volume averaging。詳見 [[fleischner-pulmonary-nodule]]。

questions.questionText: Managing incidental findings on thoracic CT, which one is WRONG?

options.text: Short-axis size threshold of 15 mm guides the decision process
Small, asymptomatic anterior mediastinum pure cystic lesions need no further work-up nor FU
Incidental pericardial cyst, HU < 10, no thickened pericardium, fluid < 50 ml, no calcification, need no further work-up nor FU
Main pulmonary artery >5.5 cm, or equal in diameter to the ascending aorta, should be reported as dilated

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **D**。Main pulmonary artery **≥3.0 cm**（非 5.5 cm）或直徑等於 ascending aorta 即應報告為擴張。詳見 [[incidental-thoracic-ct]]。

questions.questionText: Regarding chemotherapy-induced sinusoidal injury of liver, which of the followings is NOT correct?

options.text: sinusoidal dilatation, peliosis and nodular regenerative hyperplasia are pathologic findings
MRI usually depict well-defined T2 hyperintense nodule with significant diffusion restriction on DWI

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **D**。SOS 結節在 DWI 呈 iso-signal intensity（非 restricted diffusion），ADC 比 metastasis 高。詳見 [[sinusoidal-obstruction-syndrome]]。

questions.questionText: Which of the following is wrong concerning hereditary hemorrhagic telangiectasia (HHT) involving liver?

options.text: HHT is characterized by an autosomal dominant inheritance pattern, multiple mucocutaneous telangiectases, epistaxis, and visceral arteriovenous malformations
Most of the patients with liver involvement are symptomatic
Pulmonary, cerebral, and spinal arteriovenous malformations have been well documented
The common CT finding includes: dilated hepatic arteries, early filling of portal veins and hepatic veins in arterial phase suggesting arterioportal or arteriovenous shunting, biliary abnormality

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **B**。HHT 的肝臟侵犯雖可見但多數無症狀（symptomatic liver involvement uncommon）。詳見 [[hht-liver]]。

questions.questionText: About musculoskeletal involvement of sarcoidosis, which one is wrong?

options.text: Soft tissue swelling, and prominent joint effusion are common in acute sarcoidosis arthritis
Tenosynovitis, tendinitis, bursitis, and synovitis can be demonstrated on MR, but findings are nonspecific
Sarcoid muscle nodules usually present a fusiform, longitudinally oriented nodules with central low signal umbilication on TT2WI or T1W C+ FS
Sarcoidosis in digits generally present a lacy trabecular configuration without significant periosteal reaction

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **A**。急性類肉瘤關節炎（Lofgren syndrome）踝關節腫脹為 periarticular soft tissue swelling 及 tenosynovitis，true synovitis 或 joint effusion 少見。詳見 [[sarcoidosis-msk]]。

questions.questionText: Which of the followings about giant cell tumor (GCT) of bone is correct?

options.text: Presence of a bulging extraosseous soft tissue mass specifies malignant GCT
Presence of lung metastasis specifies malignant GCT
Presence of multiple bone lesions specifies malignant GCT

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **D**。GCT 即使有侵犯性表現仍為 low-grade tumor。Lung metastasis 稱為 benign metastasizing GCT（預後良好）。約 5-10% 為 malignant，sarcomatous transformation 多見於放療後。詳見 [[giant-cell-tumor]]。

questions.questionText: Acro-osteolysis can be present in the following conditions EXCEPT...
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **C**。NF1 不是 acro-osteolysis 的典型病因。Scleroderma、psoriatic arthritis、hyperparathyroidism 皆可造成指端骨溶解。詳見 [[acro-osteolysis]]。

questions.questionText: When chorionic villi invade into the myometrium, it is known as
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **C**。Accreta = 附著 myometrium 表面；Increta = 侵入 myometrium；Percreta = 穿透至 serosa。詳見 [[placenta-accreta-spectrum]]。

questions.questionText: 假設病患的右肱動脈血壓為 a mmHg，左肱動脈血壓為 b mmHg，右大腿血壓為 c mmHg，左大腿血壓為 d mmHg。請問關於 ABI (ankle-brachial pressure index) 之敘述下列何者錯誤?

options.text: 右大腿之 ABI 為 c / (a+b)
如果右大腿之 ABI= 1.3，原因可能是右大腿動脈嚴重鈣化

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **A**。ABI = ankle SBP / 兩側 brachial SBP 中**較高者**（非兩側之和）。正確公式應為 c / max(a,b)。詳見 [[ankle-brachial-index]]。

questions.questionText: Which of the following description about thyroid radiofrequency ablation is NOT true?

options.text: The transisthmic approach refers to the insertion of a RF electrode via the isthmus
The electrode tip can be initially positioned in the deepest and most remote portion of the nodule, with subsequent retraction to the most superficial portion of the nodule
The ablation is safe when the electrode moves in a forward direction even toward the "danger triangle" between the trachea and thyroid gland
Ablation is safer when the tip of the electrode is well positioned within a 1-2 mm distance from the target nodule margin

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **C**。Danger triangle 位於 trachea 與 thyroid 之間，electrode 朝此方向移動是**危險的**，非安全。詳見 [[thyroid-rfa]]。

questions.questionText: Regarding the Synthetic Mammography (SM) reconstructed from digital breast tomosynthesis (DBT), which of the following statements is correct?

options.text: Unlike standard full-field digital mammography (FFDM), SM does not require additional radiation exposure
The artifacts of SM include blurring subcutaneous tissue, loss of resolution in the axilla on MLO views, pseudocalcifications, and decreased resolution near foreign bodies

SM's strengths include a reduced radiation dose, shorter acquisition time compared with a combined FFDM/DBT exam, increased conspicuity of calcifications, speculated margins, and architectural distortion
The weakness of SM includes the potential for false positives of pseudocalcifications and the difficulty in assessing from motion artifact

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **E**。A-D 全部正確。SM 由 DBT 重建、不需額外輻射、有特定偽影與優缺點。詳見 [[synthetic-mammography]]。

questions.questionText: About incomplete spinal cord syndromes (ISCS), which one is correct?

options.text: Injury to neurons in the ventral horns and peripheral nerves results in LMN deficits
CCS is the most common ISCS. Trauma is the most common cause of CCS
CMS causes mixed UMN and LMN deficits, while CES causes a purely LMN deficit

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **D**。A-C 全部正確。CCS 最常見、外傷為主因；CMS = mixed UMN+LMN；CES = pure LMN。詳見 [[incomplete-spinal-cord-syndrome]]。

questions.questionText: Which statement about chronic lymphocytic inflammation with pontine perivascular enhancement responsive to steroids (CLIPPERS) is wrong?

options.text: punctate and curvilinear enhancement of the pons
clinical and radiological responsiveness to glucocorticosteroid-based immunosuppression
long-term immunosuppressive therapy for sustained improvement

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **B**。CLIPPERS 的 pontine lesion 不會呈現 diffusion restriction。特徵為 punctate/curvilinear enhancement、steroid responsive。詳見 [[clippers]]。

questions.questionText: Which is not the risk factor of recurrence in meningiomas?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **E**。Age 不是 meningioma 復發風險因子。Bone invasion、low ADC、proximity to sinuses、mushroom shape 皆為復發風險因子。詳見 [[meningioma-recurrence]]。

questions.questionText: Rapidly progressive dementia can result from a variety of etiologies, including:

options.text: prion disease such as Creutzfeldt-Jakob disease
infectious entities such as HIV-associated dementia
autoimmune and inflammatory conditions such as Hashimoto encephalopathy

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **D**。RPD 的病因涵蓋 prion disease（CJD）、感染（HIV）、自體免疫/發炎（Hashimoto encephalopathy）等。詳見 [[rapidly-progressive-dementia]]。

questions.questionText: Which is the sign of CT diagnosis of chronic pulmonary thromboembolism?

options.text: Transpleural systemic collateral vessels (eg, intercostal arteries) may develop
Multiple peripheral linear opacities in both lower lung lobes

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **D**。慢性肺栓塞 CT：鈣化血栓、transpleural collateral vessels、bilateral lower lobe peripheral linear opacities 皆為特徵。詳見 [[chronic-pulmonary-thromboembolism]]。

questions.questionText: Regarding pulmonary complications of hematologic malignancy. Which is NOT true?

options.text: Pulmonary hemorrhage, leukostasis, pneumonia are the most common pulmonary complications
Leukostasis is difficult to differentiate from pulmonary hemorrhage radiologically
CMV and RSV viral pneumonia are usually found during the period of 31-100 days after transplantation
Findings of CMV pneumonia include bilateral parenchymal opacities and innumerable nodules

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **B**。Leukostasis 以 interstitial pattern 為主，pulmonary hemorrhage 以 alveolar consolidation 為主，影像上**可以區分**。詳見 [[hematologic-malignancy-pulmonary]]。

questions.questionText: The "gut signature" is disrupted in which of the following diseases?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **A**。Colon carcinoma 侵犯腸壁全層，破壞正常 gut signature（五層結構消失）。Early Crohn's、UC、diverticulosis 雖影響腸壁但仍保留基本層狀結構。詳見 [[bowel-wall-layers]]。

questions.questionText: Which type of osteosarcoma has the best prognosis?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **B**。Parosteal osteosarcoma 為 low-grade surface osteosarcoma，預後最好（5年存活率 >90%）。Conventional 與 telangiectatic 為 high-grade。詳見 [[parosteal-osteosarcoma]]。

questions.questionText: Compared with pyogenic spondylitis, which is NOT a common feature of TB spondylitis?

options.text: Subligamentous spread of large paraspinal abscesses

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **B**。Early and severe disc destruction 是 pyogenic spondylitis 的特徵，非 TB。TB spondylitis 特徵為 relative disc preservation、subligamentous spread、skip lesions、panvertebral involvement。詳見 [[tb-spondylitis]]。

questions.questionText: Which is NOT a common finding of scurvy?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **D**。Epiphyseal hypoplasia 不是 scurvy 的典型表現。Scurvy 特徵包括 Frankel line、beaking/corner sign、periosteal elevation（subperiosteal hemorrhage）。詳見 [[scurvy-skeletal]]。

questions.questionText: Regarding adrenal tumors, which statement is FALSE?

options.text: Chemical shift MRI can be used to differentiate adenoma from non-adenoma adrenal lesion
Unenhanced CT value less than 10HU is suggestive of adrenal adenoma
Myelolipoma cannot be diagnosed from fat-suppression MRI or non-contrast CT
Fat-containing adrenal metastases can be misleading

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **C**。Myelolipoma 含大量 macroscopic fat，在 non-contrast CT 可見明顯脂肪密度（<-30 HU），fat-suppression MRI 亦可見 signal drop。因此 C 敘述錯誤。詳見 [[adrenal-adenoma]]。

questions.questionText: Which is NOT a TI-RADS assessment item?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **C**。ACR TI-RADS 五項評估為 composition、echogenicity、shape、margin、echogenic foci。Vascularity 不在其中。詳見 [[ti-rads]]。

questions.questionText: Regarding gadolinium deposition in brain, which statement is correct?

options.text: Only happens in patients with renal insufficiency
Only associated with linear gadolinium agents
The clinical significance of gadolinium deposition remains unknown
Can only be detected by inductively coupled plasma mass spectrometry (ICPMS), not by in vivo MRI

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **C**。Gd 沉積的臨床意義仍未知。A 錯（腎功能正常者亦可發生）、B 錯（linear 為主但 macrocyclic 亦有報告）、D 錯（T1WI 上可見 dentate nucleus/globus pallidus 訊號增加）。詳見 [[gadolinium-contrast]]。

questions.questionText: Which is NOT true about TACE?

options.text: Lidocaine added to the chemotherapy mixture decreases the analgesic requirements post-embolization
Portal vein visualization of iodized oil in post-procedure CT implies recurrence of HCC
Grade 0 portal vein visualization is the best prognosis
The blockage of the blood supply at the level of the distal subsegmental artery is important

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **C**。Portal vein visualization grading：grade 0 = 沒有 lipiodol 進入 portal vein，但這不代表預後最好。Portal vein visualization 反映 TACE 的滲透程度，適度滲透反映較佳的治療效果。詳見 [[tace]]。

questions.questionText: Which statement about pinch-off syndrome is INCORRECT?

options.text: The lumen of the central venous catheter is compromised between the clavicle and the first rib
Lateral subclavian vein insertion is more vulnerable to pinch-off
The catheter may fragment and embolize to the heart or pulmonary artery
Pinch-off sign can be recognized on chest X-ray

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **B**。**Medial** insertion 更容易被 costoclavicular space 夾擠，非 lateral。詳見 [[pinch-off-syndrome]]。

questions.questionText: 關於由 digital breast tomosynthesis (DBT) 重建之 Synthetic Mammography (SM)，下列何者敘述錯誤?

options.text: SM/DBT combo 較 FFDM/DBT combo 可減少篩檢劑量
SM 優勢包含 calcification conspicuity 增加、spiculated margin 與 architectural distortion 偵測提升
SM 缺點包含 blurring subcutaneous tissue、axilla 解析度降低、pseudocalcifications、foreign body 附近解析度降低

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **D**（D 是錯誤敘述，因為 A-C 全部正確）。SM 由 DBT 重建不需額外輻射，具有特定優缺點。詳見 [[synthetic-mammography]]。

questions.questionText: Regarding McCune-Albright syndrome, which statement is wrong?

options.text: Precocious puberty is more common in males

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **D**。McCune-Albright syndrome 的 precocious puberty 在男女發生率相當（或女性更多），非男性較多。Triad：polyostotic FD + café-au-lait spots + endocrine hyperfunction。詳見 [[mccune-albright]]。

questions.questionText: Regarding ameloblastoma, which statement is wrong?

options.text: May present with oral and facial symptoms
Soap bubble appearance on panoramic radiograph

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **D**。Ameloblastoma 最常見於 **mandible**（約 80%），非 maxilla。詳見 [[ameloblastoma]]。

questions.questionText: Umbilical venous catheter (UVC) does NOT traverse which of the following structures?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **B**。UVC 正常路徑：umbilical vein → portal sinus → ductus venosus → IVC。Portal vein（右門脈分支等）不在正常路徑上，進入 portal vein 為 malposition。詳見 [[uvc-catheter-route]]。

questions.questionText: Which is NOT a musculoskeletal manifestation of congenital syphilis?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **A**。Wimberger **ring** sign 是 scurvy 的特徵（epiphysis 周圍環狀密度增加），而非 congenital syphilis。注意：Wimberger **sign**（proximal tibial metaphysis 內側破壞）才是 congenital syphilis。詳見 [[congenital-syphilis-skeletal]]。

questions.questionText: Regarding meconium peritonitis, which statement is WRONG?

options.text: It is a chemical peritonitis caused by in utero bowel perforation
Fibroadhesive type is the most common
Water-soluble contrast enema can be used for differential diagnosis
No case requires surgery despite calcification, ascites, or pseudocyst

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **D**。嚴重 meconium peritonitis（伴有 calcification + ascites + pseudocyst）仍可能需要手術。並非所有病例都不需手術。詳見 [[meconium-peritonitis]]。

questions.questionText: Which is NOT a characteristic finding of optic nerve sheath meningioma?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **B**。Hypointense pseudocapsule 不是 ONSM 的特徵。ONSM 典型表現包括 intratumor calcification、tram-tracking enhancement、perioptic cyst。詳見 [[optic-nerve-sheath-meningioma]]。

questions.questionText: Which CNS disease has a relapsing-remitting course?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **d**。Reversible migrainous stroke 具有 relapsing-remitting 病程。Leukodystrophies 為進行性退化、CADASIL 為進行性小血管病變、Neuro-Behcet 雖可復發但以 progressive 為主。詳見 [[relapsing-remitting-cns]]。

questions.questionText: Regarding CLIPPERS (chronic lymphocytic inflammation with pontine perivascular enhancement responsive to steroids), which statement is INCORRECT?

options.text: It is a brainstem encephalitis centered on the pons
It shows punctate and curvilinear enhancement predominantly in the pons

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **B**。CLIPPERS 的特徵為**無明顯 vasogenic edema**（lack of significant edema），這是與其他 brainstem lesions 鑑別的重要線索。詳見 [[clippers]]。

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT a classic diagnosis of "Hair on ends" appearance of skull bone?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Expert DDx Brain and Spine 2009 1st ed, Section 1, p6-7
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **B**。Osteosarcoma 的 hair-on-end（sunburst）periosteal reaction 出現在長骨，不是頭骨 hair-on-end 外觀的典型診斷。Hair-on-end skull 見於 thalassemia、sickle cell、leukemia 等。詳見 [[hair-on-end-skull]]。

questions.questionText: Which of the following is wrong about fibrous dysplasia?

options.text: Radiographs depict a well-circumscribed lucent lesion in the metaphysis or diaphysis with a ground-glass appearance
The most common benign rib lesion
MRI is the best technique for characterizing fibrous dysplasia
Periosteal reaction is usually not present unless it is associated with a pathologic fracture

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；RadioGraphics 2015; 35:2049-2052
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **C**。CT 比 MRI 更適合用於 FD 的影像診斷，因為 CT 能更清楚顯示 ground-glass matrix 及骨骼形態。MRI 在 FD 的 signal 變化多樣，難以做出特異性診斷。詳見 [[fibrous-dysplasia]]。

questions.questionText: About elbow ultrasound, which one of the following is WRONG?

options.text: The lacertus fibrosus extends from the myotendinous junction of the distal biceps to the medial deep fascia of the forearm
The lacertus fibrosus covers the ulnar nerve and the brachial artery and its function is to keep the biceps tendon in the appropriate position
The distal portion of the biceps tendon is covered by an extrasynovial paratenon and by the bicipitoradial bursa
This bicipitoradial bursa is normally not visible at US unless distended with fluid effusion

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Radiology 2015 Jun;275(3):636-50
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **B**。Lacertus fibrosus 覆蓋的是 **median nerve** 與 brachial artery，非 ulnar nerve。詳見 [[elbow-us-anatomy]]。

questions.questionText: About hand and wrist imaging, which one of the following is WRONG?

options.text: Scaphoid fractures represent about 70% of all carpal fractures, dividing into stable and unstable fractures, which is important to define surgical and nonsurgical treatment
Scaphoid tubercle fractures and incomplete waist fractures are stable
Comminuted fractures, fracture-dislocations, oblique distal pole fractures, proximal pole fractures, and complete/displaced waist fractures are all considered unstable

Ligament injuries can lead to progressive instability and further deterioration of the wrist joint; Scapholunate dissociation, resulting from injury of the lunotriquetral ligament is the most common form of carpal instability

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Radiology 2016 Jun;279(3):674-92
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **D**。Scapholunate dissociation 源自 **scapholunate ligament** 損傷，非 lunotriquetral ligament。詳見 [[carpal-instability]]。

questions.questionText: 診斷腎血管肌肉脂肪瘤最可靠的影像工具是？
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Textbook of Uroradiology v4, 2008, p154
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **A**。CT 是診斷 renal AML 最可靠的工具，可偵測腫瘤內 macroscopic fat（<-10 HU）。

> [!warning] 爭議答案
> 答題卷標示 A (or B?)，部分來源認為 MRI 的 chemical shift 對 fat-poor AML 更敏感，但 CT 仍為首選標準工具。

詳見 [[renal-angiomyolipoma]]。

questions.questionText: 下列有關 renal oncocytoma 之相關敘述，何者錯誤？

options.text: 在電腦斷層上，常可看到腫瘤內有 central stellate scar
此 central stellate scar 的影像特徵，並未見於 renal cell carcinoma

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Textbook of Uroradiology v4, 2008, p137
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **D**。Central stellate scar 也可見於 RCC（尤其是 chromophobe RCC），並非 oncocytoma 獨有，影像上無法單靠 scar 鑑別。詳見 [[renal-oncocytoma]]。

questions.questionText: 下列有關 sporadic renal angiomyolipoma 之敘述，何者正確？

options.text: 約百分之五的腫瘤，在電腦斷層上無法認出腫瘤內所含之脂肪
大多數病人有明顯症狀
在超音波上，大多為低回音性實質腫瘤

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Textbook of Uroradiology v4, 2008, p153-154
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **B**。約 5% 的 AML 為 fat-poor type，CT 無法偵測 macroscopic fat。A 錯（女性好發 F:M=2-4:1）、C 錯（多無症狀）、D 錯（多為高回音 hyperechoic）。詳見 [[renal-angiomyolipoma]]。

questions.questionText: 下列有關 tuberous sclerosis complex 之描述，何者為誤？

options.text: 約百分之八十的病人，有腎臟血管肌肉脂肪瘤
通常兩側腎臟皆有病灶

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Textbook of Uroradiology v4, 2008, p153
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **C**。TSC 為 autosomal dominant，男女比例相當，無明顯性別差異。詳見 [[renal-aml-tuberous-sclerosis]]。

questions.questionText: 在判定攝護腺癌之腫瘤局部分期（T staging）上，以下影像工具何者最有用？
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Textbook of Uroradiology v4, 2008, p342
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **C**。MRI（尤其 mpMRI）為攝護腺癌局部分期（T staging）最佳影像工具，可評估 extracapsular extension、seminal vesicle invasion 等。詳見 [[prostate-mpmri]]。

questions.questionText: Which of the following imaging finding and description about Sclerosing Angiomatoid Nodular Transformation (SANT) is wrong?

options.text: SANT is a benign vascular lesion consisting of multiple angiomatoid nodules surrounded by dense fibrous tissue that often coalesces centrally to form a scar
Usually isointense on T1-weighted images and hypointense on T2-weighted images
Most of them have heterogeneous hypo-enhancement during the arterial and portal venous phases of contrast-enhanced CT or MRI, with peripheral enhancing radiating lines
